name: Nyan AI API
description: LLM-powered query API with built-in web search, audit verification, and optional BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) watchtower mode.

auth.note: Token must match NYAN_OUTBOUND_API or NYAN_OUTBOUND_API_DEV configured on the server. No token required for /health or /guide.

endpoints.description: Submit a query to the full AI pipeline. Runs preflight routing, optional web search, LLM reasoning, and a two-pass audit. Returns a single JSON response.

documents.description: Documents to parse and include in context.

byok.description: BYOK Watchtower — your model key handles S2 reasoning, NyanBook's key always handles S3 audit verification.

base_url.description: Must start with https://. Defaults to Groq endpoint.

response.byok_used: boolean — present only when byok block was supplied
response.draft: string|null — original answer before correction; present when byok_used=true and badge≠verified

endpoints.description: Pure Psi-EMA calculation — no LLM, no web search. Returns technical analysis (θ, z-score, R-ratio).
Quick liveness check. Returns server status, supported modes, and endpoint list.
Full API reference for agents and integrators.
System diagnostics — DB health, LLM provider status, Discord bots, memory, uptime.

modes.general: Open-ended questions, news, science, history, current events. Triggers web search when needed.
modes.seed-metric: Property affordability index — price/sqm, income, years-to-own for cities.
modes.psi-ema: Stock technical analysis (θ/z/R). Include ticker symbol or use /psi-ema endpoint.

badges.verified: Audit passed — answer confirmed against sources or logic.
badges.fixable: Audit found issues and applied corrections. Final answer is corrected version.
badges.unverified: Audit could not confirm or deny — answer delivered as-is.
badges.rejected: Answer rejected after max retries. May be refusal or best-effort fallback.

byok_watchtower.summary: Your key for S2 reasoning. NyanBook's key always runs S3 audit.
flow: S2 Reasoning → your key + your model
If badge≠verified, response includes draft (original answer before correction)
